meta.notes: Mixed Tier-1 (Wowhead Quotes) + Tier-2 (wiki + Whisper) entries.

quotes.text: Continue the rituals! I will handle these fools.
quotes.transcript: Continue the ritual! I will handle these fools!

quotes.text: Can you feel the winds? They come for you...
quotes.transcript: Can you feel the winds? They come for you.

quotes.text: You are too late! The Wrath of Azshara has arrived!
quotes.transcript: You are too late! The wrath of Ashara has arrived!

quotes.text: Guardians of the ritual, prepare yourselves! She will not be disappointed!
quotes.transcript: Guardians of the Ritual, prepare yourselves! She will not be disappointed!

quotes.text: Hmph. Intruders. They will not get far.
quotes.transcript: Hmm, intruders. They will not get far.

quotes.text: Ah, we meet again, weakling. Now it's just you and me... and my guards!
quotes.transcript: Ah, we meet again, weakling. Now it's just you and me and my guards.

quotes.text: Fools! Get out of the way!
quotes.transcript: Fools! Get out of the way!

quotes.text: It will be done, Tide Mistress.
quotes.transcript: It will be done, Tide Mistress.

quotes.text: You deal with our death, Tithysa. I shall take the prisoner to the slave pens.
quotes.transcript: You deal with our death, Tithysa. I shall take the prisoner to the slave pens.

quotes.text: You weaklings will drown beneath these waves!
quotes.transcript: Ha ha ha ha! You weaklings will drown beneath these waves!

quotes.text: You killed my son! Your punishment is death!
quotes.transcript: Oh, you killed my son! Your punishment is death!

quotes.text: How long can you hold your breath, high one?
quotes.transcript: How long can you hold your breath, High Wonder?

quotes.text: Pity you cannot survive without air!
quotes.transcript: Pity you cannot survive without air!

quotes.text: Before the crashing waves, comes the quake!
quotes.transcript: Before the crashing waves comes the quake

quotes.text: The earth trembles before the rising tide!
quotes.transcript: The Earth trembles before the rising tide.

quotes.text: Justice for the son you murdered!
quotes.transcript: Justice for the son you murdered!

quotes.text: This was as inevitable as the tides, fools.
quotes.transcript: This was as inevitable as the tide's fools.

quotes.text: The oceans rest... but the wind still rises against you.
quotes.transcript: The oceans rest. But the wind still rises against you.

quotes.text: Gaaah... The winds will finish you, intruders.
quotes.transcript: The winds will finish you in Trudas.

quotes.text: You... haven't won... She... is almost here...
quotes.transcript: You haven't won. She is almost here.

quotes.text: I... I've failed... But my queen will not...
quotes.transcript: I... I failed... But my queen will not!
